name: consumer-health-block
title: Consumer Health Dashboard
description: A friendly patient-facing home — upcoming appointments (with check-in), open care gaps, my vitals, my medications + adherence, and messages. DashboardShell + DashboardGrid of M2 panels.

props.name: appointments
props.description: Supports the check-in tracker for the current visit.

clinicalNotes: The patient-facing counterpart to the provider view: same panels, gentler framing. Lead with what the patient can act on — the next appointment (with a live check-in tracker) and open care gaps — then their own vitals and medications with an adherence ring that reframes 'non-compliance' as missed doses. Keep the language plain; the panels already avoid jargon-only status (color + text). Directly reusable upstream in the Petals patient app.
notes: Layer-M3 block (B-3). Client component. Composes 5 M2 panels.
